name: Hyperscale Data, Inc.
business: Hyperscale Data, Inc. owns and operates data centers that provide AI compute infrastructure and Bitcoin mining services. Through its subsidiaries, it also offers crane rental, hotel operations, defense solutions, commercial electronics, and fintech services, but plans to divest its non-core businesses by 2027.

exposures.sentence: Through our wholly owned subsidiary, Sentinum, Inc. (Sentinum), we own and operate a large-scale data center platform that integrates AI compute infrastructure with Bitcoin mining operations under a unified, parallel compute model.

Through our wholly owned subsidiary, Sentinum, Inc. (Sentinum), we own and operate a large-scale data center platform that integrates AI compute infrastructure with Bitcoin mining operations under a unified, parallel compute model.
Sentinums revenue is currently generated primarily from mining Bitcoin for our own account.
Circle 8 primarily provides lifting solutions for the U.S. domestic oil market.
Gresham: defense solutions with operations conducted by Enertec, Relec, Microphase and Giga-tronics.
crane rental and lifting solutions provider for oilfield, construction, commercial and infrastructure markets
TurnOnGreen: commercial electronics solutions with operations conducted by Digital Power, and electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions through TOG Technologies.
Technology and Finance (Fintech): commercial lending and trading through Ault Lending.
Omnipresent Robotics, LLC (Omnipresent); through which we are focused on the development, deployment, and commercialization of advanced robotics systems, AI and data-driven automation technologies.

catalysts.event: Distribution of Series E Preferred Stock
catalysts.sentence: On December 9, 2024, we completed the distribution of 650,000 shares of our 10% Series E Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock...
The reverse stock split became effective on November 22, 2024.

catalysts.event: Sale of Third Avenue Apartments property
catalysts.sentence: On December 13, 2024 (the Closing Date), Third Avenue Apartments LLC... completed the sale of its real property... The sale price for the property was $13.0 million.

On November 28, 2025, the United States Bankruptcy Court for the District of Arizona confirmed Greshams bankruptcy plan... Consequently, Gresham may be deemed to have emerged from bankruptcy on November 28, 2025.

catalysts.event: Sentinum Hosting Services Agreement with data center hosting company
catalysts.sentence: On June 9, 2025, Sentinum entered into a Hosting Services Agreement (the Agreement) with a data center hosting company (the Service Provider).
During October 2025, Sentinum purchased 4,092 S21+ and S21 Pro Bitcoin miners (the S21 Miners) for approximately $16 million.

catalysts.event: Installation of HPC customer at Michigan Facility
catalysts.sentence: During April 2025, Sentinum completed the installation requirements for deployment of a 250 kilowatts HPC customer.

catalysts.event: Launch of $100 million Bitcoin treasury strategy
catalysts.sentence: On September 15, 2025, we announced the launch of a $100 million Bitcoin treasury strategy as part of our transformation into a pure play AI data center and digital asset company, which we refer to as our digital asset treasury strategy (DAT).
We currently expect the divesture of Ault Capital (the Divestiture) to occur in the second quarter of 2027.
